title: No Wither
description: This Mod simply makes it impossible to spawn Withers.
body:
# No Wither

Are your Players griefing your entire Server with Withers?

With this Mod you can disable the spawning of Wither. So your Server can remain free of these Monster from Hell.

<b><sub>Other Mods may still be able to summon Wither, because only the Vanilla way is removed.
